testcase.failure:
[firefox] › e2e.spec.js:35:3 › Demoblaze E2E Suite › 4. Add product to cart @cart ────────────────
Error: expect(locator).toHaveCount(expected) failed
Locator: locator('#tbodyid tr') Expected: 1 Received: 0 Timeout: 10000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveCount" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for locator('#tbodyid tr') 23 × locator resolved to 0 elements - unexpected value "0"
43 | 44 | await cart.open(); > 45 | await expect(cart.rows()).toHaveCount(1); | ^ 46 | }); 47 | 48 | test('5. Remove product from cart @cart', async ({ page }) => { at D:\Geo_Testing\demoblaze-playwright-automation-suite\tests\e2e.spec.js:45:31
